scripts.electron-dev: set NODE_ENV=development&& npm run bundle-python && concurrently "npm start" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && node_modules\.bin\electron ."
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run bundle-python-mac && cp electron.js build/ && cp preload.js build/ && cp public/vosk-audio-processor.js build/ && electron-builder --mac
scripts.bundle-python-mac:
echo 'Creating Python bundle...' && rm -rf python-bundle && mkdir -p python-bundle/python-env/lib/python3.9/site-packages && pip3 install --target python-bundle/python-env/lib/python3.9/site-packages --upgrade pip vosk>=0.3.45 websockets>=11.0 torch>=1.9.0 soundfile>=0.12.1 kokoro>=0.7.16 'misaki[en]' numpy huggingface_hub spacy>=3.7.0 phonemizer-fork spacy-curated-transformers num2words espeakng-loader https://github.com/explosion/spacy-models/releases/download/en_core_web_sm-3.8.0/en_core_web_sm-3.8.0-py3-none-any.whl && cp -r /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/Library/Frameworks/Python3.framework/Versions/3.9/lib/python3.9 python-bundle/python-env/lib/ && echo 'Copying websocket servers...' && if [ -d 'Vosk-Server/websocket' ]; then mkdir -p python-bundle/python-env/vosk-server && cp -r Vosk-Server/websocket/* python-bundle/python-env/vosk-server/; else echo 'Skip: Vosk-Server/websocket not found'; fi && if [ -d 'Kokoro-TTS-Server/websocket' ]; then mkdir -p python-bundle/python-env/kokoro-tts && cp -r Kokoro-TTS-Server/websocket/* python-bundle/python-env/kokoro-tts/; else echo 'Skip: Kokoro-TTS-Server/websocket not found'; fi && printf '#!/bin/bash
SCRIPT_DIR="$(dirname "$0")"
BUNDLE_PYTHONPATH="$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/python3.9/site-packages"
export PYTHONPATH="$BUNDLE_PYTHONPATH:$PYTHONPATH"
exec /usr/bin/python3 "$@"
' > python-bundle/python-env/python3 && chmod +x python-bundle/python-env/python3 && echo 'Calculating bundle checksum...' && BUNDLE_SIZE=$(find python-bundle/python-env -type f -exec wc -c {} + | tail -1 | awk '{print $1}') && echo $BUNDLE_SIZE > python-bundle/bundle-checksum.txt && echo "Bundle size: $BUNDLE_SIZE bytes" && echo 'Python bundle creation completed successfully!'
scripts.bundle-python-win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Write-Host 'Creating Python bundle...'; if (Test-Path 'python-bundle') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'python-bundle' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'python-bundle/python-env/lib/python3.10/site-packages' -Force | Out-Null; $zipUrl='https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.10.8/python-3.10.8-embed-amd64.zip'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $zipUrl -OutFile 'python-embed.zip'; Expand-Archive -Path 'python-embed.zip' -DestinationPath 'python-bundle/python-env/' -Force; Remove-Item 'python-embed.zip'; 'python310.zip','lib/python3.10/site-packages','','# Uncomment to run site.main() automatically','import site' | Set-Content 'python-bundle/python-env/python310._pth'; $getPipLocal = 'python-bundle/python-env/get-pip.py'; if (-not (Test-Path $getPipLocal)) { Write-Host 'Downloading get-pip.py...'; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py' -OutFile $getPipLocal -UseBasicParsing } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py' -OutFile $getPipLocal -UseBasicParsing } } else { Write-Host 'Using local get-pip.py' }; $py = '.\\python-bundle\\python-env\\python.exe'; Write-Host 'Bootstrapping pip into embedded Python...'; & $py -s -E $getPipLocal pip==24.2 --no-warn-script-location; $env:PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK='1'; $env:PIP_NO_INPUT='1'; $env:PIP_CONFIG_FILE=$null; $target='python-bundle/python-env/lib/python3.10/site-packages'; Write-Host 'Installing core packages (embedded pip)...'; & $py -s -E -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --ignore-installed --isolated --no-warn-script-location --target $target pip==24.2 vosk==0.3.45 websockets==11.0.3 torch==2.2.2 soundfile==0.12.1 kokoro==0.7.16 numpy==1.26.4 huggingface_hub==0.24.6; Write-Host 'Installing transformers (pinned range)...'; & $py -s -E -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --ignore-installed --isolated --no-warn-script-location --target $target 'transformers>=4.21.0,<4.45.0'; Write-Host 'Installing TTS deps...'; & $py -s -E -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --ignore-installed --isolated --no-warn-script-location --target $target spacy==3.7.5 phonemizer-fork==3.3.0 spacy-curated-transformers==0.3.1 num2words==0.5.13 espeakng-loader==0.2.4; Write-Host 'Installing misaki + spaCy model...'; & $py -s -E -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --ignore-installed --isolated --no-warn-script-location --target $target 'misaki[en]==0.7.16' https://github.com/explosion/spacy-models/releases/download/en_core_web_sm-3.8.0/en_core_web_sm-3.8.0-py3-none-any.whl; Write-Host 'Installing misc deps...'; & $py -s -E -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --ignore-installed --isolated --no-warn-script-location --target $target colorama==0.4.6 tqdm==4.66.4 regex==2024.5.15 filelock==3.15.4 attrs==24.2.0 urllib3==2.2.2 typing_extensions==4.12.2 charset-normalizer==3.3.2 idna==3.7 certifi==2024.7.4 cffi==1.16.0 pycparser==2.22; & $py -s -E -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade --force-reinstall --ignore-installed --isolated --no-warn-script-location --target $target numpy==1.26.4 'misaki[en]==0.7.16'; Write-Host 'Copying websocket servers...'; if (Test-Path 'Vosk-Server/websocket') { if (-not (Test-Path 'python-bundle/python-env/vosk-server')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'python-bundle/python-env/vosk-server' -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'Vosk-Server/websocket/*' 'python-bundle/python-env/vosk-server/' } else { Write-Host 'Skip: Vosk-Server/websocket not found' }; if (Test-Path 'Kokoro-TTS-Server/websocket') { if (-not (Test-Path 'python-bundle/python-env/kokoro-tts')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'python-bundle/python-env/kokoro-tts' -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'Kokoro-TTS-Server/websocket/*' 'python-bundle/python-env/kokoro-tts/' } else { Write-Host 'Skip: Kokoro-TTS-Server/websocket not found' }; Write-Host 'Calculating bundle checksum...'; $bundleSize = (Get-ChildItem -Path 'python-bundle/python-env' -Recurse | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum).Sum; $bundleSize | Out-File -FilePath 'python-bundle/bundle-checksum.txt' -Encoding utf8; Write-Host \"Bundle size: $bundleSize bytes\"; Write-Host 'Python bundle creation completed successfully!'"
scripts.bundle-python: node -e "const os = require('os'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const platform = os.platform(); function calculateDirSize(dirPath) { if (!fs.existsSync(dirPath)) return 0; let totalSize = 0; function walkDir(dir) { const files = fs.readdirSync(dir); for (const file of files) { const filePath = path.join(dir, file); const stat = fs.statSync(filePath); if (stat.isDirectory()) { walkDir(filePath); } else { totalSize += stat.size; } } } walkDir(dirPath); return totalSize; } function needsRebundle() { const bundleDir = 'python-bundle/python-env'; const checksumFile = 'python-bundle/bundle-checksum.txt'; if (!fs.existsSync(bundleDir)) { console.log('Bundle directory not found, creating bundle...'); return true; } if (!fs.existsSync(checksumFile)) { console.log('Checksum file not found, creating bundle...'); return true; } try { const savedSize = parseInt(fs.readFileSync(checksumFile, 'utf8').trim()); const currentSize = calculateDirSize(bundleDir); if (savedSize !== currentSize) { console.log('Bundle size mismatch (saved: ' + savedSize + ', current: ' + currentSize + '), recreating bundle...'); return true; } console.log('Bundle is up to date (size: ' + currentSize + ' bytes)'); return false; } catch (error) { console.log('Error checking bundle, recreating...'); return true; } } if (needsRebundle()) { if (platform === 'win32') { execSync('npm run bundle-python-win', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else if (platform === 'darwin') { execSync('npm run bundle-python-mac', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('Linux bundle not implemented yet, using system Python'); } } else { console.log('Python bundle already exists and is valid.'); }"
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run bundle-python && copy electron.js build\ && copy preload.js build\ && copy public\vosk-audio-processor.js build\ && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && cp electron.js build/ && cp preload.js build/ && cp public/vosk-audio-processor.js build/ && electron-builder --linux
